feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /KR/ - Kemono Thread #5
entry.content: YOU LIVE LIKE THIS? EDITION Long live the leakers! Use this https://pawchive.st/ instead of Kemono. Other suggested alternatives welcome. Keep the thread alive Provide a image/video reference or link(s) Be patient, don't complain, and check the previous thread for requests that have already been made/fulfilled SFW thread: >>>/wsr/1555529 Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84017118/
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /b/ Random: Proper but dirty fetish
entry.content: I have this very specific fetish about cute and innocent looking girls dressed properly/demurely but being dirty, in the sense of not having washed for a while (greasy hair, stinky pussy etc). I had this gf who looked like that and she was depressed (of course, they all are) so she often wouldn't shower for a few days, but she was also a huge slut, so we'd have lots of dirty sex, especially a lot of oral sex. For some reason I really enjoyed her stink, it was always good and not disgusting (whic
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: When you actually think about it, are the GTA games even actually good? Good eno…
entry.content: When you actually think about it, are the GTA games even actually good? Good enough to be this multi-billion singularity that GTA6 has grown into? The gameplay is basic, the shooting isn't satisfying, the driving is mixed, the missions are mostly all similar "drive somewhere, shoot some guys, it goes wrong and there's a car chase or something", and the humour is mostly "British developers taking the piss out of American culture ten years too late" that mostly goes over the head of people playing
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.content: Do you think he'll shutter Thekla a month after release or will he last a year?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: physical media freakout is stupid
entry.content: what sets apart games apart from other goods(say, cars) is that it's intellectual property. if you copy someone else's game his game just doesn't vanish into thin air. with one copy of a game you can make an infinite number of games that's why games are shared-if you "purchase" a game on steam then valve decides to share their copy with you. if you torrent a game the game is shared among the pirate community. consolekeks have been brainwashed by marketing to think by buying a """physical copy"""
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /int/ International: Why did Russians ethnically cleanse them? Don't get me wrong, Russians are hell …
entry.content: Why did Russians ethnically cleanse them? Don't get me wrong, Russians are hell spawns, but they relocated millions Crimean Tatars, Germans and Poles. The Baltic coast is a strategic location and they were okay to have this non-Russian ethnicity live there. If I would have been a the TSSSSAAAARRR I would have created a Russian ethnic-corridor from Königsberg through Wilnó to Minsk. Like how Poles captured the Baltic coast and removed the indigenous Germans from Danzig.
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Deluxe edition. No major changes other than >Better netcode >Nerf to p2w DLC fig…
entry.content: Deluxe edition. No major changes other than >Better netcode >Nerf to p2w DLC fighters >Maybe a new single player mode And absolutely no new characters. Basically a more polished and ironed out re-release of ultimate (I.e deluxe version). Should be cheap enough to make and i and many other consoomers would consoom it.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.content: >Every major cast member announcement to date has been white; Jamie Dornan, Anna Taylor-Joy, Kate Winslet, Leo Woodall, as well as the returning stars including Elijah Wood and Sir Ian McKellen. The question is, why? >Serkis nods his head before answering and it is clear this is a subject he has given a lot of thought: "Tolkien himself was influenced a lot by Norse mythology, there's a lot of that feeling. >"The Shire feels very, very much like a very, a very white, you know…" >He trails off and
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Why do americans consider 100k miles to be high mileage? Always found this weird…
entry.content: Why do americans consider 100k miles to be high mileage? Always found this weird on american car forums, 180k seems to be the mark where they consider a car "finished". Oil changes are a tad weird too, with people insisting you should get one done at 3k Here any 4cyl shitbox does 500k+ without issues and people definitely don't baby them by changing the oil every month
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Why are there no covid kinos?
entry.content: There is endless scope for film ideas from the covid era. We could have a covid zombie thriller where horsepaste turns chuds into killer zombies, or dramatised 28 weeks later style covid film where chuds cause the spread of a real killer virus and it would be a race against time to track down chuds who spread the virus basically intentionally through their lack of taking the vaccine etc. The potential ideas are endless.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /int/ International: The American way of having a grass field garden is making its way here. My neigh…
entry.content: The American way of having a grass field garden is making its way here. My neighbours keep complaining I don't remive nettles on my property, which I keep because butterflies nest in it. One of them tried to come and mow my grass while I wasn't home. It's full with dandelions and daisies. One of them succesfully succeeded with poisoning a portion of my wild which I kept for wildflowers. Ofcourse these are all crusted ass boomers who paved their entire driveway and 75% of their gardens.
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.content: >Ian gets asked to make a wish >thinks its fake but realizes its real >somehow lets Bear just leave instead of getting on his ass about what happened to Sarah >randomly shows up at their house bragging about something that Bear already knows about >gets shot and killed by Nikki (who suddenly has a gun now) >Bear somehow escapes Nikki and locks himself in the bathroom >Nikki despite having access to a brick and a gun doesn't use any of this to break the door down >succumbs to Fake Nikki's wish af

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Every single thing going on is leading to a digital prison where you need a digi…

If you use a smartphone kys.

No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Just rewatched the original Jurassic Park and there's nothing inherently threate…
entry.content: Just rewatched the original Jurassic Park and there's nothing inherently threatening about the premise. The characters act like cloning dinosaurs is the equivalent of creating the atom bomb, when in reality there's no threat. Ignoring the fact that they could have chosen to limit the cloning to only herbivores if they wanted maximum security, what's the greatest threat that a rogue T-Rex actually poses? They can't rapidly reproduce, they can't overtake an urban environment, and presumably one ma
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: No surrender=afk
entry.content: If you refuse to surrender in an obvious unwinnable game, I will just sit there until you lose and you can waste your time. Just a reminder.... >you're not tough because you didn't surrender >you're not going to Valhalla because you didn't surrender >you're not a man because you didn't surrender >you don't make more money than me because you didn't surrender >you're not accomplishing anything meaningful because you didn't surrender Youre wasting your own time and everyone else's. The option is t
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /b/ Random: my mom is such a gay little bitch...she recently went on a trip to Japan, and wh…
entry.content: my mom is such a gay little bitch...she recently went on a trip to Japan, and when she got back, it was clear that she did not even appreciate going to Japan...i have wanted to go to Japan since i was a child, and i will never be able to go, and my mom goes to Japan and doesn't even give a fuck about going there, for her it was just one more dumb little outing, and she goes on many...i have to ask, i'm not even saying there is or isn't a God, i'm just curious, how much of a fucking faggot is thi
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Mexican Governor Marina del Pilar Ávila leaking audio
entry.content: The Governor of Baja California, Marina del Pilar Ávila Olmeda, is currently facing a major political scandal following the leak of audio recordings where she can be heard negotiating with intermediaries and alleged FBI agents. According to investigative journalism reports, the governor offered to share classified information from Mexico's national security meetings in exchange for halting criminal charges, sanctions, and a potential extradition order against her.
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /int/ International: Seriously, why does their government hate white people now?
entry.content: >be me >try to do some bureaucracy (city hall, land office, etc) >years ago they would’ve been polite, professional, and helpful >now they speak in rude Japanese (no desu/masu), aren’t helpful, and basically act like DMV sheboons from America >then they’ll flip around entirely and act obsequiously towards some jeet who doesn’t speak any japanese and didn’t bring a translator At first I thought they were just taking out their frustrations on whites, because the other races would just get violent,
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I'm on OlauncherCF, and it's the best "minimalist" launcher IMHO. UnLauncher is …
entry.content: I'm on OlauncherCF, and it's the best "minimalist" launcher IMHO. UnLauncher is a close second, and max comfy, though it has performance issues on newer versions of Android, so it's probably not worth checking out for most people. Have tried at least two-dozen "minimalist" launchers over the years and haven't found any that come close to those two. All the others seem to range from bugfests to bloatfests (including most other OLauncher forks), and the OG OLauncher has been freemium trashware for
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: How did LLMs replace coders but is shockingly bad at basically every other use-c…

entry.title: /g/ Technology: My wife and I constantly get spam and scam phone calls and so does everyone else…
entry.content: My wife and I constantly get spam and scam phone calls and so does everyone else we know. Some of these calls are garden variety spam, but some are sophisticated phishing attempts by people who did their homework on me presumably by background checking my phone number. We want to buy a SIP trunk that can receive calls only and use a home Linux server to answer the line. This number can only receive calls and if anyone ran a background check on it, it would come back to the VoIP company we bought
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Android
entry.content: What is the new popup notification thing that keeps blocking my entire screen on my phone for 5 seconds at a time every single time an app has a notification, and how do I stop it? I'll be using the internet browser, even in the middle of typing something, and suddenly a banner will pop up on top of what I'm doing to deliver a notification in the middle of the screen in the middle of me doing something else, while the entire rest of the screen is covered and blocked out by some kind of grey blur
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >ISP CGNAT'D me just a few days ago It's so over > Yes—the Tailscale journal con…
entry.content: >ISP CGNAT'D me just a few days ago It's so over > Yes—the Tailscale journal contains enough evidence. Your connection appears to have moved to CGNAT on July 10, 2026, at approximately 22:59 UTC. How could they do this. I was so happy having port forwarding.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Arguably the strongest malware engine ever built, and it edged out Bitdefender i…
entry.content: Arguably the strongest malware engine ever built, and it edged out Bitdefender in one recent AV-Comparatives test (99.8% vs. 99.5%). However, government restrictions and trust concerns in several countries mean many people no longer recommend it universally despite its technical excellence. Common Sense as antivirus is a fucking retarded concept, so don't bring your bullshit culture here.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: IMO, gay bottoms should be fat. Everybody knows the old saying "more cushion for…
entry.content: IMO, gay bottoms should be fat. Everybody knows the old saying "more cushion for the pushin," and it's true that for a girl, thick thighs and a fat ass make the experience of sex more physically enjoyable. What's yet to be universally recognized is that the same holds true for men. Nobody ACTUALLY wants to pound against the bony pelvis of a skinny twink. You want a nice, comfortable, padded assfucking, and a big guy with a big ass and big thighs gets the job done. Honestly your bottom should hav
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /b/ Random: SUS Scene...
entry.content: Ever since I first saw this scene, I’ve always thought it was one of the most "sus" scenes in the entire series... Those mouths wide open like that, with the tongues lolling out... Any thoughts on this?
